goals.description: Send the 'still vibing' text to cohort_3 immediately, promising to join in 5 mins just to clear my conscience and avoid the awkward silence of ghosting them while I hide.
goals.rationale: Relationships weigh 0.5 on my value scale; the guilt of missing their hangout is a social friction I can't handle. I need to smooth this over instantly so I can retreat to my room without facing anyone. The assignment is already late (past 18:00), so dealing with it now feels like a massive risk that could ruin my mood or get me yelled at by prof_assignment.

goals.rationale: My impulsive nature means I discount future consequences heavily. Staying up late to finish the analysis feels like a chore that ruins tonight's fun. Prioritizing leisure and connection right now will give me immediate dopamine relief, even if the reading deadline at 20:00 slips again.

goals.description: Finish the remaining 42% of the analysis section tomorrow morning after coffee.
goals.rationale: I'm too tired (sleep debt + stress) to focus deeply right now. Pushing back on the task avoids current friction. Tomorrow feels far enough away that the anxiety isn't paralyzing yet, so I'll procrastinate until then.
